name: The Phantom Knights of Fragile Armor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フラジャイルアーマー
desc: If a face-up "The Phantom Knights" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Fragile Armor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up "The Phantom Knights" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Fragile Armor" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up "The Phantom Knights" monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Phantom Knights" card from your hand to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "The Phantom Knights of Fragile Armor" once per turn.

mentions: The Phantom Knights of Fragile Armor
action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
